connections.def: from 1225; a traducer; specially, Satan (compare 7854):--false accuser, devil, slanderer. see GREEK for 1225 see HEBREW for
neuter of a derivative of 1142; a dæmonic being; by extension a deity:--devil, god. see GREEK for

connections.gloss: have a (be vexed with, be possessed with) devil(-s)
connections.def: middle voice from 1142; to be exercised by a dæmon:--have a (be vexed with, be possessed with) devil(-s). see GREEK for
